votes.rationale: motion-0084 planning program is complete. All 7 child motions ratified (motion-0085 through motion-0091). All success criteria met: project-intake.schema.yaml, agent-demand-matrix.schema.yaml, topology-plan.schema.yaml, wave-model.schema.yaml, bootstrap-manifest.schema.yaml, bootstrap-generator.spec.md, generate-bootstrap.mjs, coverage-declaration.schema.yaml, and dispatch-integration.spec.md all committed. Generator validated by real-write proof.

All 7 child motions ratified; no outstanding child motions remain DRAFT. Planning artifacts span WS-A through WS-E in correct workstream order. No runtime features implemented. No OffBook.ai architecture defined — only the framework for defining it.

Program closes truthfully from ratified child motions. All planning artifacts are committed and validated. dev-jai-nexus retains ownership of all artifact writes throughout. Bootstrap framework is ready for future project use.
